questions.clue: This French term for a small dish served before the main meal in European cuisine applies whether the bite-sized food is brought to seated guests or passed at a cocktail reception.

citations.title: Hors d'oeuvre

questions.clue: This New York businessman co-founded a major financial data and media company, then served three terms as the 109th mayor of New York City from 2002 to 2013.

citations.title: Michael Bloomberg

questions.clue: Its founders wanted a catchy four-letter name following the pattern of major brands like Nike and Coke; the result is an acronym that celebrates the community for which the hip-hop fashion label was made.

citations.title: FUBU

questions.clue: This American shapewear and clothing brand, co-founded by a reality television star and Swedish entrepreneur Jens Grede, was valued at over $5 billion as of 2025.

citations.title: Skims
citations.snippet: Skims is an American shapewear and clothing brand co-founded by Kim Kardashian and Jens Grede. The company is valued at over $5 billion as of 2025.

questions.clue: The sole Irish member of the pop group assembled on The X Factor in 2010, this singer and multi-instrumentalist has since built a successful solo recording career.

citations.title: Niall Horan
citations.snippet: Niall James Horan (born 13 September 1993) is an Irish singer, songwriter, musician, and multi-instrumentalist. He rose to prominence as a member of the boy band One Direction, formed in 2010 on the singing competition The X Factor.
